demos.text: Modern web applications employ meaningful URLs for users’ benefit. When an address is clear and memorable, visitors are more apt to favor the page, return anon, and use that same URL to reach it directly with little fuss.
demos.reasoning: The passage uses polished, generalized phrasing and an awkward expression such as “return anon,” which is characteristic of AI-generated paraphrasing rather than natural human technical prose.

demos.text: This special Operator skips all tasks downstream of itself if you are not on the "latest" DAG run (if the wall-clock time right now is between its execution_time and the next scheduled execution_time, and it was not an externally-triggered run).
demos.reasoning: The passage is concise technical documentation describing a specific operator and its scheduling behavior. Its terminology and somewhat awkward, implementation-focused phrasing are characteristic of human-authored software documentation rather than typical AI-generated prose.
